labels.notes: Gregory Alan Murray 11:02am — flush-on-stop session (Run 1 stopped while Gregory's encounter was still active in buffer; flush path generated SOAP via the same multi-patient gate as post_split per v0.10.68 fix). 29-min visit covering seizure disorder (therapeutic anti-seizure levels for first time), chronic respiratory condition, scalp lesion exam, family travel update. SOAP, dx 345 (Epilepsy), A004A + Q310A all correct. POSITIVE BASELINE: validates the v0.10.68 flush-path multi-patient gate alignment (test guard in flush_on_stop.rs::flush_on_stop_uses_same_multi_patient_threshold_as_post_split).
